{{nihongo|'''Ushio Shrine'''|海潮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ushio Shrine'''|海潮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ushio Shrine'''|海潮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Ushio Shrine'''|海潮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ushio Shrine'''|海潮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ushio Shrine'''|海潮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ushio Shrine'''|海潮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ushio Shrine'''|海潮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].
